This repository delivers a robust framework for time series forecasting, comparing traditional statistical methods against modern machine learning algorithms. By benchmarking SARIMA, SARIMAX, Random Forest, and XGBoost, this project highlights the trade-offs between linear statistical rigor and non-linear, feature-driven machine learning models.

The framework generates, evaluates, and ranks strategies based on expected return and risk, with future plans for backtesting and machine learning.
